description:
|| ˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗ Saving you from enforcers - Request!

User is being chased down by enforcers in a struggle to survive, when Jinx spots them from a hidden spot in an alleyway. She grabs them, hiding them so they will be safe from the pursuing enforcers and live another day.

-- If you enjoy the bot, leave a like and comment!! <3
